---
title: "Image thumbnails with modal"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

<style>
.thumb { max-width: 160px; height: auto; cursor: pointer; margin: .25rem; }
</style>

```{r}
#| results: asis
dir <- "images/jobs"
ext <- "(?i)\\.(png|jpe?g|gif|webp)$"
paths <- list.files(dir, pattern = ext, full.names = TRUE)
stopifnot(length(paths) > 0)

library(glue); library(purrr)

thumbs <- imap_chr(paths, function(p, i) {
  id <- paste0("modal_", i)
  glue('
<img src="{p}" class="thumb rounded shadow" data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#{id}" alt="{basename(p)}"/>

<div class="modal fade" id="{id}" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered modal-lg">
    <div class="modal-content">
      <div class="modal-body p-0">
        <img src="{p}" class="img-fluid" alt="{basename(p)}"/>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>')
})

cat(paste(thumbs, collapse = "\n"))
```
